reviews.comment:
Si se pudiese les pondría un cero. Si buscas una estación de SERVICIO para poder hacer lo básico que es cargar combustible, buscate otra porque acá SERVICIO NO HAY.

(Translated by Google)
If I could, I'd give them a zero. If you're looking for a gas station to do the basics, like fill up, look elsewhere because there's NO SERVICE here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmMGVQdlJBEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención en los surtidores es super lenta. Ir con mucha paciencia.. nunca funcionan todos.. siempre alguna tiene algún problema.. siempre hay fila.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the pumps is incredibly slow. Go with a lot of patience... they never all work... there's always one that's malfunctioning... there's always a line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmc3Z6b3NRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ojo... el Shop no está abierto 24 horas... tampoco tiene horario... una lastima....

(Translated by Google)
Heads up... the shop isn't open 24 hours... it doesn't have set hours either... what a shame....

Excellent service. You can even take a nap there.

reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo. Reconozco que hay lentitud. Pero el tema es que cierran a las 22 hs ( NO están las 24 hs abierta como publicitan) y a partir de las 20:30 hs comienzan a limpiar los pisos y tenes que irte a un rinconcito

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice. I admit it's slow. But the problem is they close at 10 pm (they're not open 24 hours as advertised) and they start cleaning the floors at 8:30 pm, so you have to go to a corner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cmNySzNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hola buenas tardes.
La verdad hoy me dejaron  sorprendido. Me llamó una empleada del automóvil  Club de g
Cafetería. La Sta. Claudia  informándome que un conocido  mio se había olvidado una riñonera  con documentación  y dinero.
Hay poca gente que devuelve lo que  encuentra tal como.encontro.
Muchas gracias  Claudia  Cajal.
De Parte de Javier Cicero.
Mi nombre es Fabian  Almada.

(Translated by Google)
Hello, good afternoon.
I was truly surprised today. An employee from the Automobile Club de G
Cafeteria, Ms. Claudia, called me to inform me that an acquaintance of mine had left behind a fanny pack containing documents and money.
It's rare for people to return what they find in the same condition as they found it.

Thank you very much, Claudia Cajal.

From Javier Cicero.

My name is Fabian Almada.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2bWVyakt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para comer algo rico! Esta divino desde que lo remodelaron y las chicas que atienden son divinas!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to eat something delicious! It's been lovely since the renovation and the girls who serve are wonderful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2LU1XcG9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
No puedo poner cero. El servicio no tiene nada que ver a una YPF y de hecho no entiendo como tiene la licencia. Servicio lento y si te pueden cobrar en negro mejor.

(Translated by Google)
I can't give it zero. The service has nothing to do with a YPF station, and in fact, I don't understand how they have the license. Slow service, and if they can charge you under the table, even better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2Njh6aVB3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención tanto en la playa de carga de combustibles como en la confiteria.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the fuel pump and in the confectionery shop.

reviews.comment:
Anoche fui con una amiga a comer unas hamburguesas riquísimas y nos encantó la atención de las chicas, Clau y Nélida unas genias! Muy buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Last night I went with a friend to eat some delicious hamburgers and we loved the service from the girls, Clau and Nélida were fantastic! Excellent service
